titleStmt.title: SII 18.57: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 57. (B.K. No. 149 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This fragmentary inscription refers itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva who was ruling from the capital Poṭṭaḷakeṛe and mentions a subordinate whose name is lost. Only the imprecatory portion is preserved.
As the characters belong to 10-11th century A.D., the record is assigned to Jayasiṁha II.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpritvīvalla
bha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrī majjagadēkamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānaṁ salu
ttamire poṭṭaḷakeṟeya nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkatā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajī
vi © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāsā
mantaṁ vijayalakṣmīkāntanahitakritāntaṁ ta The stone is broken after this.

bahubhirvvasudhā bhuThis portion seems to be
ktā rājabhiḥ sagarādi
bhiḥ yasya yasya ya
dā bhūmistasya tasya tadā
phalaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmma
sētuḥ nripāṇāṁ kālē kā
lē pālanīyō bhavadbiḥ
sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthi
vēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmabhadraḥ .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
harēttu vasuṁdharāThe stone is broken
Digital edition of SII 18.57 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
